Answer these questions from the employer

These questions are from the employer. If a question seems inappropriate, you can .Fields marked with an asterisk(*) are required.
This role is subject to national security requirements that permit employment only of sole British nationals. These questions are asked solely to assess eligibility.

For security eligibility purposes, please indicate whether you: *
This role requires a level of national security clearance that typically involves verifying at least 10 years of continuous UK residency. This information is requested solely to assess your eligibility for security vetting.

Please confirm which of the following applies to you: *
In the past 5 years, have you spent more than 28 consecutive days outside the UK? *
Do you hold a Current level of Security Clearance? *
